subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Join the Story Trail crew to turn clear ideas into Grade 2 paragraphs.
lesson.objective: I can recount an event with order words, details, and closure.
lesson.concept_explanation: Writers plan one clear idea, add connected details, and finish with a sentence that sounds complete.
lesson.common_misconception: Writers may give an answer without enough parts for the writing purpose.
lesson.real_world_connection: Clear writing helps classmates understand book choices, science facts, and real events.
lesson.lesson_summary: Plan the parts, write complete sentences, and reread with the checklist.
lesson.mini_lesson: Say the goal, choose strong details, then write sentences with capitals, spaces, and punctuation.

worked_examples.text: Watch: Plan the parts before you write the paragraph.
Demo: Reread the draft with the writing checklist.

hint_ladder: Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Check capitals, spaces, and punctuation before you finish.

guided_practice.prompt: Which sequence word could begin a narrative about planting seeds?
hints: Read the writing goal carefully.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Check capitals, spaces, and punctuation before you finish.
guided_practice.explanation: The answer fits the writing target and stays on topic.
guided_practice.feedback: Good writing move — it matches the checklist.
events: I filled a cup with soil
I tucked three seeds under the soil
I watered the cup and set it by the window

game_theme.title: Narrative Writing With Sequence Skill World
game_theme.mission_intro: Build writing power by practicing recount an event with order words, details, and closure.

level_banks.label: Level 3: Write Beginning / Middle / End
level_banks.focus: Order events into beginning, middle, and end.

questions.prompt: Put the beginning, middle, and end in order for planting seeds.
questions.correct_answer: Beginning: I filled a cup with soil | Middle: I tucked three seeds under the soil | End: I watered the cup and set it by the window
hints: Read the writing goal carefully.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Check capitals, spaces, and punctuation before you finish.
questions.explanation: The answer fits the writing target and stays on topic.
questions.feedback: Good writing move — it matches the checklist.
acceptable_answers: Beginning: I filled a cup with soil | Middle: I tucked three seeds under the soil | End: I watered the cup and set it by the window
I filled a cup with soil; I tucked three seeds under the soil; I watered the cup and set it by the window
events: I filled a cup with soil
I tucked three seeds under the soil
I watered the cup and set it by the window
sequence: I filled a cup with soil
I tucked three seeds under the soil
I watered the cup and set it by the window
ordered_events: I filled a cup with soil
I tucked three seeds under the soil
I watered the cup and set it by the window

level_banks.label: Level 4: Build a Narrative
level_banks.focus: Write a simple narrative with order, details, and closure.

questions.prompt: Write a simple narrative about planting seeds with order words, details, and closure.
questions.correct_answer: First, i filled a cup with soil. Next, i tucked three seeds under the soil. Finally, i watered the cup and set it by the window. I felt proud when the first sprout appeared.
hints: Read the writing goal carefully.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Check capitals, spaces, and punctuation before you finish.
questions.explanation: The answer fits the writing target and stays on topic.
questions.feedback: Good writing move — it matches the checklist.
acceptable_answers: First, i filled a cup with soil. Next, i tucked three seeds under the soil. Finally, i watered the cup and set it by the window. I felt proud when the first sprout appeared.
First, i filled a cup with soil. Then, i tucked three seeds under the soil. Finally, i watered the cup and set it by the window. It was a day to remember.
events: I filled a cup with soil
I tucked three seeds under the soil
I watered the cup and set it by the window
questions.closing: I felt proud when the first sprout appeared.

questions.prompt: Write a simple narrative about making a card with order words, details, and closure.
questions.correct_answer: First, i folded bright paper. Next, i drew a big heart. Finally, i wrote a kind note inside. My friend smiled when I gave the card.
hints: Read the writing goal carefully.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Check capitals, spaces, and punctuation before you finish.
questions.explanation: The answer fits the writing target and stays on topic.
questions.feedback: Good writing move — it matches the checklist.
acceptable_answers: First, i folded bright paper. Next, i drew a big heart. Finally, i wrote a kind note inside. My friend smiled when I gave the card.
First, i folded bright paper. Then, i drew a big heart. Finally, i wrote a kind note inside. It was a day to remember.
events: I wrote a kind note inside
questions.closing: My friend smiled when I gave the card.

questions.prompt: Write a simple narrative about visiting the zoo with order words, details, and closure.

hints: Read the writing goal carefully.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Check capitals, spaces, and punctuation before you finish.
questions.explanation: The answer fits the writing target and stays on topic.
questions.feedback: Good writing move — it matches the checklist.

First, our class walked to the penguin area. Then, we watched the penguins swim. Finally, i sketched my favorite penguin. It was a day to remember.
events: Our class walked to the penguin area
questions.closing: I will remember the waddling penguins.
